title: ContractExtraction
description: Target schema for Track 1 — Agentic AI & Advanced RAG. Your extraction agent should produce a JSON object matching this schema for the provided contract PDF. Where a field cannot be reliably extracted, return null and have your Validator Agent flag it — DO NOT hallucinate plausible values.

contract_id.description: Unique contract identifier as shown in the document header.

effective_date.description: Effective date in ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD). Normalize whatever format you find.

headline_fee.description: The sticker fee mentioned in the contract.

total_payable.description: The actual total amount the client will pay during the Initial Term, inclusive of all surcharges and one-time fees but exclusive of taxes.

target_date.description: ISO 8601 if determinable. Null if 'To be determined' or ambiguous.

notice_days_general.description: Notice period in days for general termination of the Agreement.

notice_days_managed_services.description: Notice period in days specifically for managed services, if it differs from the general notice period.

validation_notes.description: REQUIRED. Your Validator Agent must surface any inconsistencies, conflicts, or ambiguities it detected in the source document. An empty array means you found none — which would itself be a notable finding.

field.description: JSON path to the affected field (e.g., 'parties.client.signatory_title').

issue.description: A short, factual description of the problem.
